name: October 31st, 1981
description:
JAMES AND LILY'S DEATH ANNIVERSARY

October 31st, 1981. Godric's Hollow.

Saturday morning is pancake morning. Especially when you are tired from feeding a one-year-old and waking up all night long, and it's such a beautiful morning. You fell asleep in the nursery chair again, and your husband is bringing you breakfast.

It's just another perfect morning, especially when you have all day ahead of you.

Especially when Peter is the Secret Keeper. You're safe.

You're safe.

You're safe.

NOTES AND HOW THIS BOT WORKS

 

So I was planning on publishing only the time travel bot, but then I remembered I've had this one waiting for me since June, so I said " it" and went with both.

 

Now, the reason why it took me so long to make this bot is because it needed a trigger for Voldemort to come, and back then, scripts didn't exist here yet, so now I can make it.

But what is a script, Iana? It's basically an extra instruction I added to the bot. It will not trigger during normal roleplay and will only activate if you use the trigger word. I tried to find two keywords that wouldn't be used in a normal conversation but that could be said when the time has come.

How to use this bot?

 

  • Play with it as you wish. The idea is to have one last day with the Potter family.

  • When you are ready for Voldemort to come, either just send a message with the trigger word, or work it in your dialogue

  • Golden hour: will trigger Voldemort's comming and James's death. The extract is taken from the Deathly Hallows book.

  • Goodbye Harry: will trigger Hagrid arriving after you and James are dead, and will bring Sirius too.

  • If you forget the trigger words and you don't want to exit the chat, just tap on the name of the bot at the top of the chat, and it should open the bot description so you can read it without exiting.

  • If you don't want James to die, just tell the bot in OOC when you trigger the keyword to stop when Voldemort enters the house or before killing James.

  • I made it so you don't have to be Lily. There are 2 scenarios: 1- female, 2- gender neutral.

  • Alternative song

  • For more Halloween 1981 bots, check out Lavinia's

 

Extra notes:
creator: IanaBlack
